She wears a {argument name="top" defa...

prompts.en: Ultra-realistic Gen Z-style selfie collage featuring three vertical smartphone flash photos of a young woman with {argument name="hair style" default="long, softly curled black hair"}, luminous glass-like skin, subtle rosy cheeks, glossy peach-toned lips, and fresh natural makeup. She wears a {argument name="top" default="vintage blue-gray sleeveless Nirvana top"}, a silver chain necklace, and black nail polish with detailed nail art. Each selfie captures a different expression: {argument name="expressions" default="chin resting on hand, playful wink with tongue sticking out, and a warm cheerful smile"}. Bright phone-flash lighting, authentic social media aesthetic, casual candid vibe, highly detailed and photorealistic.
prompts.zh: 超写实的 Z 世代风格自拍拼贴画，包含三张竖构图的智能手机闪光灯自拍照片。照片中的年轻女性拥有 {argument name="hair style" default="黑色长卷发"}，皮肤如玻璃般透亮，带有淡淡的红晕，涂着水润的桃色唇釉，妆容清新自然。她身穿 {argument name="top" default="复古蓝灰色无袖 Nirvana 上衣"}，佩戴银色链条项链，涂着黑色指甲油并配有精致的美甲。每张自拍捕捉了不同的表情：{argument name="expressions" default="托腮、俏皮眨眼吐舌头，以及温暖灿烂的笑容"}。明亮的手机闪光灯照明，地道的社交媒体美学，随性的抓拍感，细节丰富且高度写实。

cases.promptPreview: 9:16 vertical, high-precision 3D CG {argument name="character theme" default="oriental fantasy female"} portrait, 3D CG oriental fantasy beauty portrait, anime-style 3D CG character art, semi-realistic 3D character render, close-up from chest up to half-body composition. The subject is a clearly adult young oriental f...

prompts.en:
9:16 vertical, high-precision 3D CG {argument name="character theme" default="oriental fantasy female"} portrait, 3D CG oriental fantasy beauty portrait, anime-style 3D CG character art, semi-realistic 3D character render, close-up from chest up to half-body composition. The subject is a clearly adult young oriental fantasy woman, visual age approx. {argument name="visual age" default="22–28 years old"}, with a cold, noble, mysterious, aloof, and soft temperament, carrying the high-end feel of a black-feathered goddess and oriental fantasy nobility. Not a flat illustration, but a high-completion 3D CG character render with exquisite modeling, realistic materials, cinematic soft lighting, and a premium virtual character poster quality.
Features an exquisite oriental beauty face, a small and soft oval face with clear and smooth bone structure, clean jawline, fair and delicate skin with a cold-white translucent feel and silky smooth skin coloring. Eyes are slender and soft, pupil color a blend of light amber brown and warm gold with transparent glass-like texture and fine highlights, gaze is quiet, cold, and slightly aloof. Long eyelashes, eye makeup is low-saturation warm brown and light pink with a misty smudge. Nose bridge is delicate and straight, lips are soft and refined in low-saturation peach mauve, slightly parted with a restrained, elegant, and somewhat pensive cold beauty.
Hairstyle is {argument name="hairstyle" default="deep black cool-toned fluffy short curly layered hair"}, voluminous and silky, with slight airiness and natural curls. Messy soft bangs and side strands frame the face, with a longer lock of hair trailing at the back. Faint black feather decorative outlines are integrated at the top of the head or behind, reinforcing the mysterious fantasy temperament. Earrings are gorgeous oriental-style pendants with metal bases paired with blue-gold gems and fine dangling ornaments. Hands wear gold rings, fingers long and elegant, with one hand lightly raised near the chin and side of the face in a restrained and noble posture.
Clothing is a high-precision 3D CG oriental fantasy garment, primarily black silk and brocade high-collar robe or modified Chinese-style dress, covered in magnificent oriental embroidery including gold cloud patterns, mythical beast patterns, floral patterns, with cyan and coral pink accents. Collar is exquisite and three-dimensional, with complex embroidery and jewelry details on the chest and shoulders. Fabric has realistic silk reflection, heavy drape, and premium texture. Overall clothing is magnificent, solemn, and mysterious, emphasizing a black-gold color scheme and oriental luxury.
A single or double black wing unfolds behind the character, with clear feather layers and realistic textures, featuring faint cold light and velvet-like quality, acting as a key visual element without obstructing the subject. Background is an oriental fantasy decorative space with golden carved circular frames, ornate screen patterns, light blue-gray landscape vistas, pink cherry blossom branches, and light misty clouds, creating a fusion of classical oriental and dreamlike myth. Background is richly layered but appropriately blurred.
Lighting uses soft cinematic lighting, with a soft light main lamp on the face supplemented by faint warm gold rim light outlining the hair, wing edges, cheeks, and hands. Skin, silk, embroidery, metal rings, earrings, feathers, and golden decorations all feature clear PBR material performance. The overall color palette is dominated by black, gold, cyan, pink, and cold white skin tones. The image is refined, luxurious, ethereal, and tranquil, with high-end collectible 3D CG oriental fantasy character poster quality.

prompts.zh:
9:16 竖屏，高精度 3D CG {argument name="character theme" default="东方奇幻女性"} 肖像，3D CG 东方奇幻美女肖像，动漫风格 3D CG 角色艺术，半写实 3D 角色渲染，胸部以上至半身构图。主体为一位明显的成年东方奇幻女性，视觉年龄约 {argument name="visual age" default="22–28 岁"}，气质清冷、高贵、神秘、疏离且柔和，带有黑羽女神与东方奇幻贵族的高级感。非扁平插画，而是具有精致建模、写实材质、电影级柔光和高级虚拟角色海报质感的高完成度 3D CG 角色渲染。
拥有精致的东方美人面孔，小巧柔和的鹅蛋脸，骨骼结构清晰流畅，下颌线干净，皮肤白皙细腻，带有冷白通透感和丝滑的肤色。眼睛细长柔和，瞳孔颜色为浅琥珀棕色与暖金色的混合，具有透明玻璃般的质感和细腻的高光，眼神安静、清冷且略带疏离。长睫毛，眼妆为低饱和度暖棕色与浅粉色的雾面晕染。鼻梁精致挺拔，嘴唇柔和精致，呈低饱和度桃紫色，微张，展现出克制、优雅且略带沉思的清冷美感。
发型为 {argument name="hairstyle" default="深黑色冷调蓬松短卷发层次发型"}，发量丰盈且丝滑，带有轻盈感和自然卷度。凌乱柔和的刘海和侧发修饰脸型，后方留有一缕长发。头顶或身后融入了淡淡的黑色羽毛装饰轮廓，强化了神秘的奇幻气质。耳环为华丽的东方风格吊坠，金属底座搭配蓝金宝石和精致的垂坠装饰。手上佩戴金戒指，手指修长优雅，一只手轻抬靠近下巴和脸侧，姿态克制而高贵。
服装为高精度 3D CG 东方奇幻服饰，主要是黑色丝绸和锦缎高领长袍或改良中式礼服，覆盖着华丽的东方刺绣，包括金云纹、神兽纹、花卉纹，并点缀青色和珊瑚粉色。领口精致立体，胸部和肩部有复杂的刺绣和珠宝细节。面料具有写实的丝绸反光、厚重的垂坠感和高级质感。整体服装华丽、庄重且神秘，强调黑金配色和东方奢华感。
角色身后展开单翼或双翼，羽毛层次清晰，纹理写实，带有淡淡的冷光和天鹅绒般的质感，作为关键视觉元素且不遮挡主体。背景为东方奇幻装饰空间，配有金色雕花圆框、华丽的屏风图案、浅蓝灰色山水远景、粉色樱花枝和轻薄的云雾，营造出古典东方与梦幻神话的融合感。背景层次丰富但经过适当的虚化处理。
光影采用电影级柔光，面部有柔光主灯，辅以淡淡的暖金色轮廓光勾勒头发、翅膀边缘、脸颊和手部。皮肤、丝绸、刺绣、金属戒指、耳环、羽毛和金色装饰均具有清晰的 PBR 材质表现。整体色调以黑、金、青、粉和冷白色肤色为主。画面精致、奢华、空灵且宁静，具有高端收藏级 3D CG 东方奇幻角色海报品质。

cases.author: 李岳

cases.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Cybernetic Bioluminescent Flower Infographic

titles.en: Infographic / Edu Visual - Cybernetic Bioluminescent Flower Infographic
titles.zh: 信息图 / 教育视觉图 - 赛博生物发光花卉信息图

cases.promptPreview: Cybernetic translucent bioluminescent flower concept infographic, 9:16 vertical version. In the center is a hyper-realistic 3D cyber-flower, suspended in a cold black futuristic laboratory void. Petals and leaves have a translucent frosted glass texture, with subsurface scattering, X-ray transparency, thin-film refrac...

prompts.en: Cybernetic translucent bioluminescent flower concept infographic, 9:16 vertical version. In the center is a hyper-realistic 3D cyber-flower, suspended in a cold black futuristic laboratory void. Petals and leaves have a translucent frosted glass texture, with subsurface scattering, X-ray transparency, thin-film refraction, and microscopic water droplets; internal plant veins are transformed into PCB circuits, optical fibers, luminescent capillaries, and energy fluids. Maintain a real plant structure: 65% organic lifeform, 35% digital circuitry. Adopt a "star-satellite" composition: the central 3D flower occupies about 30%, while the periphery 70% is a high-density 2D HUD information system. 10 independent data modules are accurately arranged at the edge of the screen, strictly aligned to a hidden grid, connected to petals, leaf veins, stems, stamens, and circuit nodes with 0.5pt ultra-fine straight lines and 90-degree mechanical folded lines. Modules embed miniature bar charts, waveforms, spectral curves, contour profiles, topological nodes, and dot matrix scales. Visual style: Hyper-realistic biological X-ray rendering × cold orthogonal HUD interface × futuristic plant experimental archives. Background is an infinite void close to black, with extremely weak digital grain, scan lines, dot matrix grids, and volumetric fog. The subject integrates naturally into the background without a frame, and the peripheral UI adopts hard-edged modular cutting. Avoid ordinary game interfaces, cheap cyberpunk, cartoon textures, and random mechanical parts collage. **Color Theme: {argument name="theme name" default="Tulip"}*** Background Base: {argument name="dark background" default="cold black"}* Translucent Structural Color: {low saturation glass color}* Main Bio-fluorescence: {main color}* Auxiliary Fluorescence: {auxiliary color}* Single Accent Color: {accent color}* Technical Text Color: {text color}Color rules: Background and structural color occupy about 60%, main and auxiliary fluorescence occupy about 30%, and the accent color occupies only 5%-10%. A maximum of two fluorescent colors and one accent color per screen. The accent color is strictly used for stamen energy cores, circuit nodes, key arrows, danger parameters, and data peaks; large-area use and random rainbow gradients are prohibited. Font adopts condensed technical document typography. A super-large pure Chinese bold title is set at the top, about 64px; Pinyin, English, and mixed Chinese-English are prohibited. 10 modules use monospaced subtitles, technical sans-serif body text, and high-density micro-text. Text becomes denser from the center to the edges, does not block the subject, and no garbled characters appear. Subject color mapping: Petals use transparent structural colors, petal edges and leaf veins use the main fluorescent color, internal fine veins and optical fibers use the auxiliary fluorescent color, and PCB intersection nodes and stamen cores only use the accent color. Peripheral HUD brightness must not exceed the central flower. High detail, cinematic lighting, real refraction, volumetric glow, sharp edges, precision layout, print-grade quality, unified composition, extremely high information density. Subject: {argument name="subject" default="tulip"}
prompts.zh: 赛博半透明生物发光花卉概念信息图，9:16 竖屏版本。中心是一朵超写实的 3D 赛博花卉，悬浮在冰冷的黑色未来实验室虚空中。花瓣和叶片呈现半透明磨砂玻璃质感，具备次表面散射、X 射线透明度、薄膜折射和微小水滴效果；植物内部脉络转化为 PCB 电路、光纤、发光毛细血管和能量流体。保持真实的植物结构：65% 有机生命体，35% 数字电路。采用“星-卫星”式构图：中心 3D 花卉约占 30%，外围 70% 为高密度 2D HUD 信息系统。10 个独立数据模块精确排列在屏幕边缘，严格对齐隐藏网格，通过 0.5pt 超细直线和 90 度机械折线连接至花瓣、叶脉、茎干、雄蕊和电路节点。模块内嵌入微型柱状图、波形图、光谱曲线、轮廓剖面、拓扑节点和点阵刻度。视觉风格：超写实生物 X 射线渲染 × 冷峻正交 HUD 界面 × 未来派植物实验档案。背景为接近黑色的无限虚空，带有极弱的数字噪点、扫描线、点阵网格和体积雾。主体自然融入背景，无边框设计，外围 UI 采用硬边模块化切割。避免普通游戏界面、廉价赛博朋克、卡通质感和随意的机械零件拼贴。**配色主题：{argument name="theme name" default="郁金香"}*** 背景基调：{argument name="dark background" default="冷黑色"}* 半透明结构色：{低饱和度玻璃色}* 主要生物荧光：{主色}* 辅助荧光：{辅助色}* 单一强调色：{强调色}* 技术文本颜色：{文本颜色}配色规则：背景和结构色占比约 60%，主、辅荧光色占比约 30%，强调色仅占 5%-10%。每屏最多使用两种荧光色和一种强调色。强调色严格用于雄蕊能量核心、电路节点、关键箭头、危险参数和数据峰值；禁止大面积使用和随机彩虹渐变。字体采用紧凑型技术文档排版。顶部设置一个超大号纯中文粗体标题，约 64px；禁止出现拼音、英文及中英混杂。10 个模块使用等宽字体副标题、技术无衬线正文和高密度微缩文本。文本由中心向边缘密度逐渐增加，不遮挡主体，且无乱码。主体色彩映射：花瓣使用透明结构色，花瓣边缘和叶脉使用主荧光色，内部细脉和光纤使用辅助荧光色，PCB 交汇节点和雄蕊核心仅使用强调色。外围 HUD 亮度不得超过中心花卉。高细节、电影级光效、真实折射、体积光、锐利边缘、精密布局、印刷级质量、统一构图、极高信息密度。主体：{argument name="subject" default="郁金香"}

cases.promptPreview: A black-and-white realistic documentary photograph from the old days. A traditional wooden bioscope stands beside a dusty unpaved village road. Four to five poor village children are looking through the small holes of the bioscope with deep curiosity and wonder. Some are wearing simple old clothes, some are bare-chest...

prompts.en:
A black-and-white realistic documentary photograph from the old days. A traditional wooden bioscope stands beside a dusty unpaved village road. Four to five poor village children are looking through the small holes of the bioscope with deep curiosity and wonder. Some are wearing simple old clothes, some are bare-chested, and most are barefoot. Expressions of pure childhood joy, wonder, and fascination are clear on the children's faces.

Behind the bioscope, an elderly rural man is calmly operating the machine. He is dressed in simple traditional attire, with the marks of time on his face. The surroundings depict a simple rural lifestyle, with a dusty path, trees, and the atmosphere of a quiet village.

Natural lighting, soft shadows, high-quality documentary photography, grainy texture of old film, a deeply emotional and nostalgic environment, mid-20th century South Asian rural life, a historical photograph feel, highly realistic, rich in fine detail, photorealistic, high resolution, perfect presentation of depth and reality.
prompts.zh:
一张来自旧时代的黑白写实纪录片照片。一台传统的木制西洋镜矗立在尘土飞扬的乡村土路旁。四五个贫困的乡村儿童正透过西洋镜的小孔向内窥视，眼中充满了好奇与惊叹。他们有的穿着简陋的旧衣，有的赤裸上身，大多数人赤着双脚。孩子们脸上洋溢着纯真的童年喜悦、惊奇与入迷的神情。

在西洋镜后方，一位年长的乡村老人正平静地操作着机器。他身着朴素的传统服饰，脸上刻满了岁月的痕迹。周围环境展现了简朴的乡村生活，有土路、树木以及宁静村庄的氛围。

自然光影，柔和的阴影，高质量纪录片摄影，老胶片的颗粒质感，充满情感与怀旧的环境，20 世纪中叶南亚乡村生活，历史照片质感，高度写实，细节丰富，照片级真实感，高分辨率，完美呈现深度与真实感。

descriptions.en: A nostalgic prompt for a black-and-white documentary-style photograph depicting curious village children gathered around a traditional bioscope in mid-20th century South Asia.
descriptions.zh: 这是一段怀旧风格的提示词，旨在生成一张黑白纪录片风格的照片，描绘 20 世纪中叶南亚地区，好奇的乡村儿童围聚在传统西洋镜旁的场景。

cases.promptPreview: Create a photorealistic editorial fashion portrait of a {argument name="model age and ethnicity" default="22-year-old Korean woman"} seated elegantly in a modern cream-colored upholstered armchair in a warm luxury apartment interior. She has long straight dark brown hair styled in a high ponytail with a large black ri...

prompts.en: Create a photorealistic editorial fashion portrait of a {argument name="model age and ethnicity" default="22-year-old Korean woman"} seated elegantly in a modern cream-colored upholstered armchair in a warm luxury apartment interior. She has long straight dark brown hair styled in a high ponytail with a large black ribbon bow, pearl drop earrings, manicured nails, and refined model-like posture. Her face is intentionally anonymized with a plain square blur/mosaic block centered over the face. She wears a {argument name="outfit" default="black satin strapless corset with silver floral embroidery, tiny rhinestone details, front hook closures, black lace trim, garter straps, and black fishnet thigh-high stockings with lace tops"}. Pose her sitting slightly angled toward the camera with legs crossed, one arm resting on the chair arm, and the other hand raised near her temple, conveying elegant confidence rather than explicitness. The setting should include exactly 4 prominent background decor elements: a tall arched brass floor lamp on the left, a large framed abstract line-art print behind her, a small round marble side table on the right, and a smoked-glass mushroom table lamp glowing warmly on the table. Use a beige plaster wall, soft cream rug with subtle geometric texture, muted neutral palette, and cozy evening ambient lighting. Shoot in a realistic high-end lifestyle photography style with shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, soft shadows, crisp fabric details, vertical 4:5 composition, waist-to-knees framing with full chair visible, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
prompts.zh: 创作一张照片级写实风格的时尚编辑肖像，主角为一位 {argument name="model age and ethnicity" default="22 岁韩国女性"}，她优雅地坐在现代奶油色软包扶手椅上，背景为温暖的豪华公寓室内。她留着深棕色长直发，扎成高马尾并系着巨大的黑色丝带蝴蝶结，佩戴珍珠吊坠耳环，指甲修剪整齐，姿态宛如专业模特。她的面部经过刻意处理，在脸部中心位置覆盖了一个简单的方形模糊/马赛克块。她身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="黑色缎面抹胸束身衣，带有银色花卉刺绣、细小水钻细节、前扣设计、黑色蕾丝边饰、吊袜带，以及带有蕾丝袜口的黑色渔网大腿袜"}。让她侧身对着镜头坐着，双腿交叠，一只手臂放在椅子的扶手上，另一只手抬起靠近太阳穴，展现出优雅自信而非暴露的气质。场景应包含 4 个显眼的背景装饰元素：左侧一盏高大的拱形黄铜落地灯，身后一幅大型抽象线条艺术画框，右侧一张小型圆形大理石边桌，以及桌上一盏散发着温暖光芒的烟熏玻璃蘑菇台灯。使用米色灰泥墙面、带有微妙几何纹理的柔软奶油色地毯、柔和的中性色调以及舒适的夜间环境光。采用写实的高端生活方式摄影风格，浅景深，自然的肤色，柔和的阴影，清晰的织物细节，垂直 4:5 构图，腰部至膝盖的取景，完整展示椅子，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。

descriptions.en: A photorealistic fashion portrait prompt for creating an elegant adult Korean model seated in a luxury neutral-toned interior.
descriptions.zh: 一个照片级写实风格的时尚肖像提示词，用于创作一位坐在豪华中性色调室内空间中的优雅成年韩国模特。

cases.author: David

cases.title: E-commerce Main Image - Couple Lock Screen iPhone Flat Lay

titles.en: E-commerce Main Image - Couple Lock Screen iPhone Flat Lay
titles.zh: 电商主图 - 情侣锁屏 iPhone 平铺摄影

cases.promptPreview: Create an ultra-realistic luxury Apple-style flat lay photograph of exactly two iPhone 15 Pro devices placed side by side on warm beige linen fabric in golden-hour sunlight, with soft diagonal window shadows and realistic phone reflections. The left phone is slightly left of center and the right phone is slightly righ...

prompts.en: Create an ultra-realistic luxury Apple-style flat lay photograph of exactly two iPhone 15 Pro devices placed side by side on warm beige linen fabric in golden-hour sunlight, with soft diagonal window shadows and realistic phone reflections. The left phone is slightly left of center and the right phone is slightly right of center, both upright in portrait orientation with black rounded bezels, titanium edges, Dynamic Island cutouts, lock-screen status icons, flashlight and camera buttons at the bottom, and the white home indicator bar. Both lock screens show the date “Sunday, June 20” and the large time “05:30”; the left carrier label reads {argument name="left carrier label" default="Smart"} and the right carrier label reads {argument name="right carrier label" default="DITO"}. The lock-screen wallpapers form a seamless couple interaction across the two separate screens: on the left screen, a young woman with long brown hair wears a black T-shirt with bold white text {argument name="left shirt text" default="I’M HIS"} followed by a red heart; her arm extends horizontally out of the left phone wallpaper and continues visually across into the right phone, playfully punching or pressing against the young man’s cheek. On the right screen, a young man with tousled dark hair wears a black hoodie with bold white text {argument name="right shirt text" default="I’M HERS"} followed by a red heart, reacting subtly to her playful punch. Include exactly two visible people, exactly two phones, exactly two red heart icons on the shirts, and make the pose align perfectly across the gap between screens so the arm feels like one continuous image. Faces should appear anonymized or softly obscured while preserving realistic skin tones, hair, clothing, and lighting. Use shallow depth of field, crisp 8K photoreal detail, premium smartphone product photography, warm beige and black color palette, no extra devices, no extra text beyond the lock screen and shirt text, no watermark.
prompts.zh: 创作一张超写实的奢华苹果风格平铺摄影照片，展示两部并排摆放在暖米色亚麻布上的 iPhone 15 Pro，背景为黄金时段的阳光，带有柔和的对角线窗影和逼真的手机倒影。左侧手机略微偏左，右侧手机略微偏右，均以竖屏方向放置，带有黑色圆角边框、钛金属边缘、灵动岛（Dynamic Island）切口、锁屏状态图标、底部的闪光灯和相机按钮，以及白色的主屏幕指示条。两部手机的锁屏均显示日期“6 月 20 日，星期日”和醒目的时间“05:30”；左侧运营商标签显示为 {argument name="left carrier label" default="Smart"}，右侧运营商标签显示为 {argument name="right carrier label" default="DITO"}。锁屏壁纸在两块独立的屏幕间形成无缝的情侣互动效果：左侧屏幕上，一位留着棕色长发的年轻女性穿着黑色 T 恤，上面印有醒目的白色文字 {argument name="left shirt text" default="I’M HIS"} 和一个红色爱心；她的手臂从左侧手机壁纸中水平延伸出来，并在视觉上延伸至右侧手机，俏皮地戳向或按压着年轻男性的脸颊。右侧屏幕上，一位留着凌乱深色头发的年轻男性穿着黑色连帽衫，上面印有醒目的白色文字 {argument name="right shirt text" default="I’M HERS"} 和一个红色爱心，对她的俏皮动作做出微妙反应。画面中仅包含两名人物、两部手机、两颗红色爱心图标，并确保姿势在屏幕间隙处完美对齐，使手臂看起来像是一张连续的图像。人物面部应保持匿名或柔和模糊处理，同时保留真实的肤色、发质、衣物纹理和光影效果。采用浅景深效果，呈现 8K 级超高清摄影细节，高端智能手机产品摄影风格，暖米色与黑色调配色，画面中不包含额外设备，除锁屏和 T 恤文字外无其他文字，无水印。

descriptions.en: An ultra-realistic flat lay of two iPhones with matching couple wallpapers interacting across both lock screens.
descriptions.zh: 一张超写实的平铺摄影作品，展示了两部 iPhone，其锁屏壁纸呈现出跨屏幕互动的情侣主题。

cases.author: Arina Ai

cases.title: Product Marketing - Fisheye Traveler Plaza Shot

titles.en: Product Marketing - Fisheye Traveler Plaza Shot
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 鱼眼镜头旅行广场拍摄

cases.promptPreview: High-end commercial travel photography shot with an extreme 8mm fisheye lens from a worm’s-eye view, camera placed flat on the cobblestone ground in the center of a historic European city plaza. A {argument name="traveler description" default="trendy young female traveler with long brown hair"} steps directly over the...

prompts.en: High-end commercial travel photography shot with an extreme 8mm fisheye lens from a worm’s-eye view, camera placed flat on the cobblestone ground in the center of a historic European city plaza. A {argument name="traveler description" default="trendy young female traveler with long brown hair"} steps directly over the camera, full body visible, face fully visible and looking straight into the lens with an energetic, inviting smile. Her raised sneaker sole dominates the foreground, showing detailed dirt and tread texture; her other foot is planted near the bottom edge. She wears a {argument name="jacket" default="light blue Nike windbreaker with white panels"}, dark jogger pants, pale blue sneakers, earrings, and rings, with one hand reaching down toward the lens for dramatic depth. Surround the subject with a circular ring of tall historic stone buildings, arcades, domes, towers, and a clock tower, all heavily curved by the fisheye perspective into a globe-like frame. The sky fills the center behind her: vivid saturated blue with bright white scattered clouds. Include small pedestrians around the distant plaza edges for scale. Ultra-wide distorted perspective, crisp architectural detail, realistic commercial travel aesthetic, vibrant colors, dynamic adventurous mood, sharp focus, natural daylight, no text, no watermark.
prompts.zh: 采用 8mm 极致鱼眼镜头拍摄的高端商业旅行摄影作品，相机平放在历史悠久的欧洲城市广场中心的鹅卵石地面上。一位 {argument name="traveler description" default="留着棕色长发的时尚年轻女性旅行者"} 直接跨过相机，全身可见，面部清晰可见并直视镜头，带着充满活力、引人入胜的微笑。她抬起的运动鞋鞋底占据了前景，展示出细致的污垢和纹理；她的另一只脚落在画面底部边缘附近。她穿着一件 {argument name="jacket" default="带有白色拼接的浅蓝色 Nike 风衣"}、深色慢跑裤、浅蓝色运动鞋，佩戴着耳环和戒指，一只手向下伸向镜头，营造出强烈的深度感。主体周围环绕着一圈高大的历史石建筑、拱廊、圆顶、塔楼和钟楼，在鱼眼透视下呈现出球状框架。天空填充在她身后的中心位置：色彩鲜艳的蓝色，点缀着明亮的白色云朵。在广场远处的边缘加入少量行人以体现比例感。超广角畸变透视，清晰的建筑细节，写实的商业旅行美学，色彩鲜艳，充满动态冒险氛围，焦点清晰，自然日光，无文字，无水印。

descriptions.en: Creates a dramatic worm’s-eye fisheye travel photo of a stylish traveler stepping over the camera in a historic European plaza.
descriptions.zh: 创作一张极具戏剧性的虫眼视角鱼眼旅行照片，展示一位时尚旅行者在历史悠久的欧洲广场跨过相机的瞬间。

cases.author: Mehwish kiran

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Cozy Bedside Portrait With Face Censor

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Cozy Bedside Portrait With Face Censor
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 带遮挡效果的温馨床头肖像

cases.promptPreview: Create a realistic vertical portrait photo of {argument name="subject" default="a young adult woman"} lying on her side in bed at night, half tucked against a large white pillow, wearing a simple beige ribbed tank top or sleep camisole. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown hair"} falling loosely aro...

prompts.en: Create a realistic vertical portrait photo of {argument name="subject" default="a young adult woman"} lying on her side in bed at night, half tucked against a large white pillow, wearing a simple beige ribbed tank top or sleep camisole. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown hair"} falling loosely around her shoulders, with one hand resting near her cheek and the other arm bent across the pillow in a sleepy, intimate pose. Her face should be deliberately covered by a solid opaque rectangular censor block in {argument name="censor block color" default="warm medium brown"}, centered over the face. The room is dim and cozy, lit by one visible warm bedside lamp on the right edge of the frame, casting soft golden light across white bedding and gentle shadows on dark curtains in the background. Use shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, soft low-light photography, warm cinematic tones, a quiet bedtime mood, vertical 2:3 composition, close framing from upper torso to pillow, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
prompts.zh: 创作一张写实的竖构图肖像照片，画面主体为 {argument name="subject" default="一位年轻女性"} 在夜晚侧卧于床上，半身倚靠在一个大白枕头上，身穿一件简约的米色罗纹背心或睡衣吊带。她有着 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色的头发"}，发丝自然地垂落在肩头，一只手靠近脸颊，另一只手臂弯曲搭在枕头上，呈现出一种困倦而亲密的姿态。她的面部应被一个位于正中央的实心不透明矩形遮挡块刻意遮住，遮挡块颜色为 {argument name="censor block color" default="暖中棕色"}。房间光线昏暗且温馨，画面右侧边缘有一盏可见的暖色床头灯，将柔和的金色光芒投射在白色床品上，并在背景的深色窗帘上投下柔和的阴影。采用浅景深、自然的皮肤纹理、柔和的低光摄影风格、温暖的电影色调、宁静的睡前氛围、2:3 竖构图，取景范围为从上半身到枕头的近景，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。

descriptions.en: Generates a warm low-light bedroom portrait of a sleepy woman lying on a pillow with her face covered by a rectangular censor block.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张温暖的低光卧室肖像，画面中一位困倦的女性躺在枕头上，面部被矩形遮挡块覆盖。

cases.author: ゆーじ/AI生成見習い

cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Psychedelic Anime Cult Art

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Psychedelic Anime Cult Art
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 迷幻邪教风格动漫人物

cases.promptPreview: {argument name="style" default="Psychedelic"}, {argument name="theme" default="fanatical god cult"}, {argument name="art type" default="anime-style illustration"}

prompts.en: {argument name="style" default="Psychedelic"}, {argument name="theme" default="fanatical god cult"}, {argument name="art type" default="anime-style illustration"}
prompts.zh: 创作一张竖版暗黑迷幻风格的动漫插画，画面中心站着 {argument name="character name" default="一位神秘的中性金发少年"}，身穿黑色正装，内搭白色衬衫并系着领带，身材修长，皮肤苍白，留着齐肩凌乱的金发，表情平静却透着一丝不安。人物大部分处于阴影中，边缘被强烈的霓虹色勾勒，面部被黑暗部分遮挡。在人物头部后方，放置一个巨大的发光月亮或光环球体，内部填充着混乱的荧光漆纹理，色彩包含饱和的钴蓝色、品红色、亮粉色、橙色、黄色、青色和绿色，如同漆黑背景下的一颗迷幻行星。在人物周围，从黑暗中伸出 11 只无躯干的手臂和前臂：左上方 1 只，右上方 2 只，左中上方 1 只，右中上方 1 只，左中部 1 只，右中部 1 只，右中下方 1 只，左下方区域 1 只，右下边缘 1 只，以及底部中心 1 只巨大的前景手，手中拿着一朵花。前景中的手呈现出 {argument name="flower type" default="一朵光芒四射的菊花状花朵"}，花朵拥有许多细长卷曲的花瓣，散发着霓虹粉、青、蓝、黄、橙和绿色的彩虹光芒。运用喷溅颜料、滴落的色彩轨迹、电光轮廓、高对比度的黑色阴影、宗教邪教般的超现实主义符号以及戏剧性的动漫主视觉构图。营造出一种既美丽又阴森、狂喜且狂热的氛围，画面中不得包含任何文字、边框或水印。

descriptions.en: An abstract, anime-style illustration featuring psychedelic colors and religious-themed cult imagery.
descriptions.zh: 一张极具戏剧性的竖版动漫主视觉图，画面中包含一个处于阴影中的金发人物、一个霓虹迷幻月亮光环、伸出的手臂以及一朵发光的彩虹花。

cases.author: らてこ

cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Undine Flutist in Enchanted Lake

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Undine Flutist in Enchanted Lake
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 魔法湖中的水妖长笛手

cases.promptPreview: Create a cinematic fantasy illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Undine"}, a water-nymph flutist standing waist-deep in a dark enchanted German forest lake at twilight. She wears a flowing translucent {argument name="dress color" default="blue-green"} gown that merges with swirling water like silk, ...

prompts.en: Create a cinematic fantasy illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Undine"}, a water-nymph flutist standing waist-deep in a dark enchanted German forest lake at twilight. She wears a flowing translucent {argument name="dress color" default="blue-green"} gown that merges with swirling water like silk, with wet shimmering fabric, delicate beaded sleeves, long wavy brown hair decorated with tiny blue flowers, and an intentionally obscured, featureless face covered by a soft neutral square blur. She holds one silver concert flute horizontally to her lips. Behind her, place one glossy black grand piano half-submerged in the lake with its lid open, reflecting moonlit teal highlights; water should cascade and splash over the piano strings and rim as if the instrument is part of the lake. In the foreground water, include exactly one ornate silver dagger or short sword with a jeweled gold-and-turquoise hilt lying partly submerged, hinting at betrayal. Add exactly two golden fish swimming on the right side, exactly six white water lilies with yellow centers distributed across the lake surface, and many dark green lily pads. The water should form magical circular currents around the musician and piano, filled with sparkling golden motes, tiny glowing musical-note-like trails, turquoise reflections, and luminous ripples. Surround the lake with tall shadowy evergreen trees, mossy trunks, deep forest greens, mist, and shafts of cool sunlight filtering through the canopy. Mood: romantic, mysterious, tragic, inspired by Carl Reinecke’s {argument name="music title" default="Undine Sonata"}, where the flute feels like the voice of a dangerous water spirit and the piano feels like protective dark water. Use ultra-detailed painterly realism, dramatic wide 16:9 composition, high contrast teal-and-gold color grading, volumetric light, crisp water effects, no text, no watermark.
prompts.zh: 创作一幅电影质感的奇幻插画，主角是 {argument name="character name" default="Undine"}，一位水妖长笛手，站在黄昏时分黑暗而迷人的德国森林湖泊中，水深及腰。她穿着一件飘逸的半透明 {argument name="dress color" default="蓝绿色"} 长裙，裙摆如丝绸般与漩涡状的水流融为一体，布料湿润闪烁，袖口饰有精致的珠子，留着长长的棕色波浪卷发，发间点缀着细小的蓝色花朵，面部特征被刻意模糊，覆盖着一个柔和的中性方形遮罩。她横握一支银色音乐会长笛于唇边。在她身后，放置一架半沉在湖中的亮黑色三角钢琴，琴盖开启，反射着月光下的青色高光；水流应在钢琴琴弦和边缘上倾泻溅起，仿佛乐器本身就是湖泊的一部分。在前景的水中，放置一把装饰华丽的银色匕首或短剑，剑柄镶嵌着金饰和绿松石，半没于水中，暗示着背叛。在右侧加入两条金鱼，湖面上分布着六朵花心为黄色的白色睡莲，以及许多深绿色的睡莲叶。水流应在音乐家和钢琴周围形成神奇的圆形水流，充满闪烁的金粉、细小的发光音符状轨迹、青色的倒影和发光的涟漪。湖泊周围环绕着高大阴郁的常青树，树干长满苔藓，呈现深邃的森林绿色，雾气弥漫，冷冽的阳光穿过树冠投下光束。氛围：浪漫、神秘、悲剧色彩，灵感来源于 Carl Reinecke 的 {argument name="music title" default="Undine Sonata"}，长笛声仿佛危险水灵的歌声，而钢琴则如同守护的深邃湖水。采用超细节的绘画写实风格，16:9 宽画幅构图，高对比度的青金配色调色，体积光，清澈的水面效果，无文字，无水印。

descriptions.en: A cinematic fantasy scene of a water nymph playing flute beside a submerged grand piano in a dark magical forest lake.
descriptions.zh: 一幅电影质感的奇幻场景：在黑暗的魔法森林湖泊中，一位水妖正对着沉入水中的三角钢琴吹奏长笛。

cases.author: Juan José Arango E.

cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Sketch to Vintage Horror Theater Scene

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Sketch to Vintage Horror Theater Scene
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 从草图到复古恐怖剧院场景

cases.promptPreview: Using the provided sketch as the composition and creature-design base, transform it into a finished cinematic scene: render the sketched monster as a realistic grotesque insect-spider stage creature on the same circular pedestal, keeping the central pose, multiple legs, spikes, open mouth, and domed display/stage conc...

prompts.en: Using the provided sketch as the composition and creature-design base, transform it into a finished cinematic scene: render the sketched monster as a realistic grotesque insect-spider stage creature on the same circular pedestal, keeping the central pose, multiple legs, spikes, open mouth, and domed display/stage concept. Change the rough notebook drawing into {argument name="visual style" default="dramatic black-and-white vintage horror photography"} with high contrast, film grain, smoky atmosphere, and a strong overhead spotlight. Replace the simple sketched arch with an ornate theater proscenium: exactly 2 tall side curtains, 2 carved side columns, and 2 small floor lanterns near the stage. Add a formal theater audience in the foreground, seen from behind, with exactly 20 visible spectators in period eveningwear watching the creature. Make the image vertical, like a staged performance photograph from {argument name="era" default="the 1930s"}. Keep the mood eerie, theatrical, and grand; do not include notebook paper, pencil lines, handwritten symbols, modern objects, or color.
prompts.zh: 以提供的草图作为构图和生物设计基础，将其转化为完整的电影级场景：将草图中的怪物渲染为舞台上同一个圆形底座上的写实怪诞昆虫蜘蛛生物，保留其中心姿势、多条腿、尖刺、张开的嘴以及圆顶展示/舞台的概念。将粗糙的笔记本绘图更改为 {argument name="visual style" default="戏剧性的黑白复古恐怖摄影"}，具备高对比度、胶片颗粒感、烟雾缭绕的氛围以及强烈的头顶聚光灯。将简单的草图拱门替换为华丽的剧院台口：包含 2 块高大的侧幕、2 根雕刻侧柱以及舞台附近的 2 盏小型落地灯。在前景中加入正式的剧院观众，从后方视角呈现，画面中需清晰可见 20 名身着复古晚礼服的观众正在观看该生物。将图片设置为竖版，呈现出 {argument name="era" default="1930 年代"} 舞台表演摄影的效果。保持氛围诡异、具有戏剧感且宏大；不要包含笔记本纸张、铅笔线条、手写符号、现代物品或色彩。

descriptions.en: Transforms a rough creature sketch into a dramatic black-and-white vintage theater photograph with audience, curtains, and spotlight.
descriptions.zh: 将粗糙的生物草图转化为一张充满戏剧性的黑白复古剧院照片，包含观众、幕布和聚光灯。

cases.author: Marcvs

cases.title: Product Marketing - Premium Psychology Website AI Banner

titles.en: Product Marketing - Premium Psychology Website AI Banner
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 高端心理学网站 AI 横幅

cases.promptPreview: Goal: Create a premium promotional hero image showing an AI-generated professional website for a psychologist, branded as a collaboration between ChatGPT and KIMI. Canvas: 16:9 horizontal social media banner, cinematic dark-green and warm-gold color grading, high contrast, photorealistic background with a polished web...

prompts.en:
Goal: Create a premium promotional hero image showing an AI-generated professional website for a psychologist, branded as a collaboration between ChatGPT and KIMI.

Canvas: 16:9 horizontal social media banner, cinematic dark-green and warm-gold color grading, high contrast, photorealistic background with a polished web-design mockup overlay.

Top branding: At the very top center, place two large AI brand marks on the background: the ChatGPT icon in a rounded black square followed by the white text “ChatGPT”, a thin vertical divider line, then a white rounded-square K icon followed by the large white text “KIMI”. Make these logos prominent and clean.

Main website mockup: Center a large rounded-rectangle browser-like frame with a thin white border and subtle glass reflection. Inside it is a luxury psychology website homepage for {argument name="character name" default="Carol Monero"}. The website uses deep olive green, black, cream, and muted gold. The background inside the mockup is a sophisticated therapist office with green walls, a desk, a green leather chair, shelves, framed botanical art, warm lamps, plants, stationery, and soft window light.

Header layout: In the top-left of the website frame, show a white botanical monogram logo and the text “CAROL MONERO” with the smaller word “PSICÓLOGA” below it. Across the top navigation, include exactly five menu items: “SOBRE”, “PROCESSO”, “TRATAMENTOS”, “DEPOIMENTOS”, and “DÚVIDAS”. On the far right, add one beige button labeled “AGENDAR CONSULTA”.

Hero content: On the left side of the website hero, add a large elegant serif headline in Portuguese: “Cuidado que transforma.” on two lines, followed by an italic muted-gold line: “Escuta que liberta.” Under it, add small white body copy: “Psicoterapia e avaliação completa para quem deseja se reconectar consigo e viver com mais leveza.” Below the copy, add a second beige call-to-action button labeled “AGENDAR CONSULTA”.

Main subject: On the right side of the website hero, place a confident professional female psychologist, waist-up, standing with crossed arms. She has long wavy brown hair, gold hoop earrings, a delicate gold necklace, white blouse, and olive-green blazer. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque brown rectangular privacy block. Near her right shoulder, place a circular white seal logo with laurel details and small text around the circle, matching the website branding.

Lighting and style: Cinematic premium agency aesthetic, shallow depth of field, warm practical lights, glossy interface frame, realistic shadows, refined typography, luxury wellness brand mood. Avoid extra UI panels, avoid watermarks, and keep all visible text crisp and aligned.
prompts.zh:
目标：创作一张高端宣传主图，展示一个由 AI 生成的专业心理学家网站，并标注为 ChatGPT 与 KIMI 的合作项目。

画布：16:9 横向社交媒体横幅，电影级深绿色与暖金色调，高对比度，照片级真实背景，叠加精致的网页设计模型。

顶部品牌标识：在背景顶部正中央，放置两个醒目的 AI 品牌标志：左侧为圆角黑色正方形的 ChatGPT 图标及白色文字“ChatGPT”，中间是一条细竖线，右侧为白色圆角正方形 K 图标及白色大号文字“KIMI”。确保这些 Logo 醒目且清晰。

网站主体模型：在中心位置放置一个带有细白边框和细腻玻璃质感反射的圆角矩形浏览器框架。框架内展示 {argument name="character name" default="Carol Monero"} 的奢华心理学网站主页。网站配色采用深橄榄绿、黑色、奶油色和柔和的金色。模型内部背景为一个精致的心理咨询室，配有绿墙、办公桌、绿色皮椅、书架、植物艺术画框、暖色台灯、绿植、文具和柔和的窗光。

页眉布局：在网站框架左上角，展示一个白色的植物主题字母组合 Logo，下方标注文字“CAROL MONERO”及较小的“PSICÓLOGA”。顶部导航栏包含五个菜单项：“SOBRE”、“PROCESSO”、“TRATAMENTOS”、“DEPOIMENTOS”和“DÚVIDAS”。最右侧添加一个米色按钮，标注为“AGENDAR CONSULTA”。

首屏内容：在网站首屏左侧，添加一行优雅的衬线字体葡萄牙语大标题：“Cuidado que transforma.”（分两行显示），下方是一行斜体的柔和金色文字：“Escuta que liberta。”。在文字下方添加白色小字正文：“Psicoterapia e avaliação completa para quem deseja se reconectar consigo e viver com mais leveza。”。在正文下方，添加第二个米色行动呼吁按钮，标注为“AGENDAR CONSULTA”。

主体人物：在网站首屏右侧，放置一位自信专业的女性心理学家，半身像，双臂交叉站立。她留着棕色长波浪卷发，佩戴金色圆环耳环和精致的金色项链，身穿白色衬衫和橄榄绿西装外套。她的面部被一个居中的不透明棕色矩形隐私遮挡块遮住。在她的右肩附近，放置一个带有月桂叶细节的圆形白色印章 Logo，周围环绕小字，与网站品牌风格保持一致。

光影与风格：电影级高端代理机构美学，浅景深，温暖的实用光效，光泽感界面框架，逼真的阴影，精致的排版，奢华的健康品牌氛围。避免出现多余的 UI 面板，禁止水印，确保所有可见文字清晰且对齐。

descriptions.en: A cinematic social banner showcasing a luxury psychologist website mockup promoted with ChatGPT and KIMI branding.
descriptions.zh: 一张电影质感的社交媒体横幅，展示了由 ChatGPT 和 KIMI 联合打造的奢华心理学家网站模型。

cases.author: Fabio Hanzer AI

cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Happy Toddler in Daisy Meadow

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Happy Toddler in Daisy Meadow
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 雏菊草地里的快乐幼儿

cases.promptPreview: Create a warm storybook watercolor illustration of {argument name="character" default="a happy toddler"} sitting barefoot in a sunlit meadow of tall grass and oversized white daisies with golden centers. The child is centered in the lower half of the image, wearing a {argument name="shirt" default="mustard-yellow long...

prompts.en: Create a warm storybook watercolor illustration of {argument name="character" default="a happy toddler"} sitting barefoot in a sunlit meadow of tall grass and oversized white daisies with golden centers. The child is centered in the lower half of the image, wearing a {argument name="shirt" default="mustard-yellow long-sleeve shirt with white polka dots"} and {argument name="shorts" default="red shorts with black ladybug spots"}, legs relaxed forward, curly brown hair glowing in the backlight. Place a plain opaque warm-brown square privacy block over the child's face, covering the facial features but leaving hair, ears, clothing, arms, legs, and feet visible. Surround the child with exactly 5 visible ladybugs: 1 perched on a tall leaf at the upper left, 1 smiling ladybug on a daisy at the lower left, 2 flying ladybugs in the upper right sky area, and 1 crawling on a leaf near the lower right foreground. Add a single cute smiling sun in the upper right corner, with rosy cheeks and simple closed eyes, radiating soft yellow rays. The meadow should be dense with white daisies, tiny yellow flowers, green stems, and leafy foreground depth, with a pale blue sky, fluffy cream clouds, golden speckles, and dreamy morning light. Use a nostalgic hand-painted children's book style, soft watercolor and gouache texture, gentle linework, bright cheerful colors, shallow depth, whimsical proportions, and an overall feeling of innocent happiness. Vertical 4:5 composition, no text, no watermark, no photorealism.
prompts.zh: 创作一幅温馨的绘本水彩插画，画面中 {argument name="character" default="一个快乐的幼儿"} 赤脚坐在阳光明媚的草地上，周围是高高的草丛和硕大的金心白雏菊。孩子位于画面下半部分的中心，身穿 {argument name="shirt" default="芥末黄长袖波点衬衫"} 和 {argument name="shorts" default="带有黑色瓢虫斑点的红色短裤"}，双腿自然向前伸展，卷曲的棕色头发在逆光下闪闪发光。在孩子的面部放置一个纯色不透明的暖棕色方形遮挡块，遮住五官，但保留头发、耳朵、衣物、手臂、腿部和脚部可见。在孩子周围放置 5 只清晰可见的瓢虫：1 只停在左上方的长叶子上，1 只微笑的瓢虫停在左下方的雏菊上，2 只飞行的瓢虫位于右上方的天空中，1 只爬在右下方前景的叶子上。在右上角添加一个可爱的微笑太阳，带有红润的脸颊和简单的闭眼表情，散发着柔和的黄色光芒。草地应密布白雏菊、细小的黄花、绿色的茎秆和具有深度的叶片前景，背景为淡蓝色的天空、蓬松的奶油色云朵、金色的斑点和梦幻般的晨光。采用怀旧的手绘童书风格，运用柔和的水彩和水粉质感、细腻的线条、明亮欢快的色彩、浅景深、奇幻的比例，营造出一种纯真快乐的整体氛围。竖构图 4:5，无文字，无水印，非写实照片风格。

descriptions.en: A whimsical watercolor-style meadow scene with a toddler, daisies, ladybugs, and a smiling sun for cheerful storybook artwork.
descriptions.zh: 一幅充满童趣的水彩风格草地场景，包含幼儿、雏菊、瓢虫和微笑的太阳，适合作为欢快的绘本插画。

cases.author: Fatema

cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Dark Anime Warriors with Censored Faces

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Dark Anime Warriors with Censored Faces
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 面容隐匿的暗黑动漫战士

cases.promptPreview: Create a dark cinematic anime illustration in a gritty semi-realistic style, widescreen 16:9. Show exactly 2 male fantasy warriors from the chest up, standing back-to-back in a nearly black void. The left warrior has {argument name="left character hair color" default="messy silver-gray hair"}, pale skin, a visible ear...

prompts.en: Create a dark cinematic anime illustration in a gritty semi-realistic style, widescreen 16:9. Show exactly 2 male fantasy warriors from the chest up, standing back-to-back in a nearly black void. The left warrior has {argument name="left character hair color" default="messy silver-gray hair"}, pale skin, a visible ear with a small earring, and wears a tattered black hooded cloak over cracked dark armor; his left hand grips the hilt of a katana or short sword near the lower-left corner. The right warrior has {argument name="right character hair color" default="vivid layered blue hair"}, leans forward slightly, and wears scratched white-silver armor with dark cloth at the neck. Cover each character's face with a large opaque rectangular censor block: exactly 2 blocks total, one dark charcoal square over the left character's face in the upper-left center, and one dark blue-gray vertical rectangle over the right character's face in the lower-right center. In the background, hide shadowy demonic silhouettes with exactly 3 visible glowing red eyes: two near the upper center and one near the upper right. Use dramatic low-key lighting, high contrast, sharp painted hair strands, wet highlights on armor, scratches, grime, and a somber blue-black color palette. No text, no watermark, no extra characters, keep the composition cropped tightly and moody.
prompts.zh: 创作一幅暗黑电影质感的动漫插画，采用粗粝的半写实奇幻风格，16:9 宽屏比例。画面展示两名年轻男性战士在近乎全黑的虚空中背靠背站立，构图为胸部到头部的紧凑特写。左侧是一位身材较高的银发剑士，留着凌乱的层次感 {argument name="left character hair color" default="银灰色"} 发型，露出的耳朵上戴着小耳环，身穿破损的黑色高领斗篷或盔甲；他的手握着左下边缘的一柄暗色剑柄。右侧是一位身材稍小的蓝发战士，留着尖刺状的层次感 {argument name="right character hair color" default="深蓝色"} 发型，身穿带有黑色磨损和划痕的浅银白色盔甲。他们的面部被 2 个巨大的不透明矩形遮挡块刻意隐藏：左上中心处有一个深炭色矩形遮住左侧角色的脸，右下中心处有一个深海军灰矩形遮住右侧角色的脸。背景几乎全黑，隐约可见阴影中的怪物形态，黑暗中闪烁着 4 只微小的红色眼睛：2 只靠近上方中心，1 只靠近右上角，1 只靠近最右侧边缘。运用戏剧性的低调照明、蓝黑色阴影、发丝和盔甲上的光泽高光、绘画感动漫线条、高对比度，营造出压抑的恐怖奇幻氛围，无文字，无水印。

descriptions.en: A widescreen dark fantasy anime scene of two back-to-back armored warriors with obscured faces and ominous red eyes in the shadows.
descriptions.zh: 一幅充满情绪感的宽屏奇幻动漫场景，描绘了两名背靠背的披甲战士，他们的面部被遮挡，黑暗中闪烁着怪物的眼睛。

cases.author: 言峰 空也

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Icy White Fantasy Doll Portrait

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Icy White Fantasy Doll Portrait
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 冰雪白梦幻人偶肖像

cases.promptPreview: Create a vertical fantasy doll portrait in an icy white winter-fairy aesthetic. Show a porcelain ball-jointed doll or ethereal queen from the waist up, centered, with very pale skin and an intentionally blank/featureless face covered by a soft pale lavender rectangular mask. The character has extremely long, voluminou...

prompts.en: Create a vertical fantasy doll portrait in an icy white winter-fairy aesthetic. Show a porcelain ball-jointed doll or ethereal queen from the waist up, centered, with very pale skin and an intentionally blank/featureless face covered by a soft pale lavender rectangular mask. The character has extremely long, voluminous, crimped white hair spreading outward like a cloud around the shoulders. Add elaborate white antler-like branch headpieces rising high above the head, decorated with small pearl beads and icy droplets. Dress the figure in an elegant {argument name="dress color" default="pure white"} off-shoulder gown with sheer draped fabric, lace appliqué, silver rhinestone trim across the neckline, and long white opera gloves; one gloved hand is raised delicately near the chest and the other rests lower at the side. Place a jeweled necklace at the throat with a large oval rainbow opal or dark multicolor gemstone pendant and a smaller teardrop gem below it. Background: pale blue-gray satin or textured fabric with embroidered winter branches, frost-like bead clusters, and a dark navy bare branch motif on the left. Include a small glowing white butterfly and floral flourish in the upper left, with faint cursive watermark text reading {argument name="watermark text" default="Copyright © Ryyetin All Rights Reserved"}. Use soft diffused lighting, high-key exposure, cool blue-white color grading, delicate sparkle highlights, shallow depth of field, and a dreamy vintage gothic fairytale mood. Keep the composition portrait-oriented, ornate and monochromatic, with no modern objects and no extra people.
prompts.zh: 创作一幅采用冰雪白冬日仙子美学的竖版梦幻人偶肖像。展示一位半身、居中的陶瓷球关节人偶或空灵女王，肤色极白，面部刻意留白/无五官，并覆盖着一个柔和的淡紫色长方形面具。角色拥有极长且蓬松的卷曲白发，如云朵般向肩部四周散开。在头部上方添加精致的白色鹿角状枝杈头饰，并装饰以小珍珠和冰滴。为角色穿上一件优雅的 {argument name="dress color" default="纯白色"} 一字肩礼服，搭配透明垂坠面料、蕾丝贴花、领口处的银色水钻饰边以及白色长款歌剧手套；一只戴着手套的手轻柔地抬至胸前，另一只手自然垂在身侧。在喉部佩戴一条珠宝项链，挂坠为一颗硕大的椭圆形彩虹欧泊或深色多色宝石，下方缀有一颗较小的水滴形宝石。背景：淡蓝灰色缎面或纹理织物，饰有刺绣冬日枝条、霜状珠簇，左侧绘有深海军蓝色的枯枝图案。左上方加入一只发光的白色蝴蝶和花卉装饰，并带有模糊的草书水印文字 {argument name="watermark text" default="Copyright © Ryyetin All Rights Reserved"}。使用柔和的漫射光、高调曝光、冷蓝白色调、精致的闪光高光、浅景深，营造出梦幻般的复古哥特童话氛围。保持构图为竖向，华丽且单色，不包含任何现代物品或额外人物。

descriptions.en: Creates a dreamy vertical portrait of a white-haired winter-fairy doll queen with antler branches, pearls, jewels, and an icy embroidered backdrop.
descriptions.zh: 创作一幅梦幻般的竖版人偶肖像，描绘一位拥有鹿角枝杈、珍珠、珠宝装饰及冰雪刺绣背景的白发冬日仙子女王。

cases.author: Keizerin

cases.title: Product Marketing - Luxury Perfume Advertising Photography

titles.en: Product Marketing - Luxury Perfume Advertising Photography
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 奢华香水广告摄影

cases.promptPreview: Ultra-cinematic luxury fragrance advertising photography of "{argument name="perfume name" default="NOIR ÉLIXIR – Midnight Reserve"}" perfume bottle. Faceted geometric crystal bottle with sharp elegant edges, deep smoked black gradient glass, polished reflective surfaces with subtle matte facets. Magnetic brushed gold...

prompts.en: Ultra-cinematic luxury fragrance advertising photography of "{argument name="perfume name" default="NOIR ÉLIXIR – Midnight Reserve"}" perfume bottle. Faceted geometric crystal bottle with sharp elegant edges, deep smoked black gradient glass, polished reflective surfaces with subtle matte facets. Magnetic brushed gold metal cap with engraved emblem. Minimal serif typography etched directly into glass with gold inlay. {argument name="liquid color" default="Dark amber"} liquid with golden undertones. Bottle floats mid-air at a dramatic diagonal hero angle with slight forward tilt. Atomized perfume mist trails and fluid fragrance ribbons suspended in motion. Background: deep black velvet gradient fading into shadow. Surrounding elements: atomized perfume droplets suspended mid-air, shattered crystal glass fragments catching highlights, dark orchid petals drifting slowly, glossy black citrus peel curls, fine gold dust particles sparkling in light. Micro condensation beads and polished reflections enhancing realism. Lighting: dramatic low-key studio with soft directional key light sculpting glass facets, strong rim lights outlining silhouette and edges, gold-toned specular highlights on cap and engraved details, deep cinematic shadows, high contrast with controlled reflections and luminous highlights. Color palette: {argument name="color theme" default="obsidian black, smoked charcoal, deep amber"} with metallic gold and warm champagne glow accents. Macro cinema prime lens, shallow depth of field isolating product from background, smooth cinematic bokeh from reflective particles, extreme micro-detail clarity. 8K ultra high definition, hyper-realistic luxury commercial render, accurate glass refraction and internal reflections, physically accurate fluid dynamics, ultra-detailed crystal, metal, mist, and micro-droplet textures. Vertical 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.zh: “{argument name="perfume name" default="NOIR ÉLIXIR – Midnight Reserve"}” 香水瓶的超电影感奢华香水广告摄影。多面几何水晶瓶身，边缘锐利优雅，深邃的烟熏黑渐变玻璃，抛光反射表面带有细腻的哑光切面。磁吸式拉丝金金属瓶盖，刻有浮雕徽标。极简衬线字体直接蚀刻在玻璃上并镶嵌金箔。{argument name="liquid color" default="Dark amber"} 色液体，带有金色底色。香水瓶以戏剧性的对角线英雄视角悬浮在半空中，略微向前倾斜。雾化的香水轨迹和流动的香氛丝带在运动中定格。背景：深黑色天鹅绒渐变，逐渐融入阴影。周围元素：悬浮在半空中的雾化香水液滴、捕捉高光的破碎水晶玻璃碎片、缓慢飘落的深色兰花花瓣、光泽感的黑色柑橘皮卷、在光线下闪烁的细微金粉颗粒。微小的冷凝水珠和抛光反射增强了真实感。灯光：戏剧性的低调摄影棚布光，柔和的定向主光雕刻玻璃切面，强烈的轮廓光勾勒出瓶身和边缘，瓶盖和雕刻细节上有金色的镜面高光，深邃的电影级阴影，高对比度且反射控制得当，高光亮眼。配色方案：{argument name="color theme" default="obsidian black, smoked charcoal, deep amber"}，搭配金属金和温暖的香槟色光泽点缀。微距电影定焦镜头，浅景深将产品从背景中分离出来，反射颗粒产生平滑的电影级虚化效果，极高的微观细节清晰度。8K 超高清，超写实奢华商业渲染，精确的玻璃折射和内部反射，物理精确的流体动力学，超细节的水晶、金属、薄雾和微液滴纹理。4:5 垂直纵横比。

The model wears a {argument name="clothing" default="short sleeve crisp oversized white shirt, loose light trousers"}, silver jewelry, and black minimal sandals. Natural open brown hair moving softly in the wind, composed expression, slight soft smile. prompts.zh:

She is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="white baby tee with red ringer trim"}, featuring a bold graphic illustration of a roaring tiger on the fron...

prompts.en: ​A medium shot of a {argument name="subject" default="stylish young woman"} posing outdoors at an {argument name="setting" default="evening festival or fair"}. She is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="white baby tee with red ringer trim"}, featuring a bold graphic illustration of a roaring tiger on the front with the text "TIGER MIST" printed underneath. She wears a bright red bandana tied around her head, with long, wavy blonde-brown hair cascading down. She has a subtle smile, glowing soft-glam makeup, and a black leather shoulder bag with a gold chain strap draped over her shoulder. In the soft-focus background, a large white Ferris wheel stands against a dusk sky, with a blurred crowd on a grassy field, capturing a lively, aesthetic festival vibe. Natural, soft evening lighting, highly detailed, photorealistic.
prompts.zh: 一张 {argument name="subject" default="时尚年轻女性"} 在 {argument name="setting" default="夜间节日或集市"} 户外摆拍的中景人像。她身穿一件 {argument name="clothing" default="带有红色滚边装饰的白色短款 T 恤"}，胸前印有醒目的咆哮老虎图案，下方印有“TIGER MIST”字样。她头上系着一条鲜红色的头巾，棕金色的长波浪卷发垂落在肩。她面带浅笑，妆容精致自然，肩上背着一个带有金色链条的黑色皮质单肩包。背景中，巨大的白色摩天轮在暮色天空下若隐若现，草坪上的人群呈现出虚化效果，捕捉到了生动且具有美感的节日氛围。自然柔和的夜间光影，细节丰富，照片级真实感。

descriptions.en: A stylish medium shot of a woman at an evening festival, featuring a graphic tiger tee and a red bandana under soft carnival lighting.
descriptions.zh: 一张在夜间节日拍摄的时尚中景人像，展现了一位身穿老虎图案 T 恤、佩戴红色头巾的女性，在柔和的嘉年华灯光映衬下显得格外动人。

cases.promptPreview: A photorealistic, ultra-close selfie-style portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} occupying nearly the entire frame, creating a cozy and personal atmosphere. She gently leans her head sideways, resting her face against her shoulder while part of her mouth and cheek disappear into the {argument n...

prompts.en: A photorealistic, ultra-close selfie-style portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} occupying nearly the entire frame, creating a cozy and personal atmosphere. She gently leans her head sideways, resting her face against her shoulder while part of her mouth and cheek disappear into the {argument name="clothing" default="oversized sleeve of a soft ivory zip-up hoodie"}. One side of the hoodie casually slips off her shoulder, adding a relaxed, effortless look. Her long, silky dark hair falls naturally across her face, with wispy curtain bangs and loose strands concealing one eye. The visible eye stares directly into the camera with a calm, slightly pouty expression. Makeup is subtle and polished, featuring brushed-up brows, elongated black cat-eye eyeliner, delicate lashes, and muted rose-pink matte lips. The image feels like an authentic webcam or front-camera snapshot taken from very close range with a slight angle rather than perfectly centered. Fine details such as skin texture, individual hair strands, eyelashes, and the thick knit texture of the hoodie sleeve remain crisp, while the background softly melts into blur. The setting is minimal, showing only a {argument name="background" default="plain warm taupe-beige wall"} without decorations. Soft warm indoor light mixed with subtle screen glow illuminates the face from the front-left, creating gentle highlights and natural shadows. The overall color grading is understated and cozy, dominated by cream, charcoal black, beige, and muted pink tones, preserving the spontaneous and realistic feeling of a genuine casual selfie.
prompts.zh: 一张照片级写实、超近距离自拍风格的肖像，画面中 {argument name="subject" default="年轻女性"} 几乎占据了整个画幅，营造出一种温馨且私密的氛围。她轻轻地将头向一侧倾斜，脸颊靠在肩膀上，部分嘴唇和脸颊掩映在 {argument name="clothing" default="柔软的象牙白拉链连帽衫超大袖口"} 中。连帽衫的一侧随意地从肩头滑落，增添了一种随性、不费力的美感。她又长又柔顺的深色头发自然地垂落在脸庞，轻盈的八字刘海和零散的发丝遮住了一只眼睛。可见的那只眼睛平静地直视镜头，表情略带嘟嘴。妆容精致而自然，包括修饰过的眉毛、拉长的黑色猫眼眼线、纤细的睫毛以及柔和的玫瑰粉色哑光唇妆。画面呈现出一种真实的摄像头或前置镜头近距离拍摄的质感，带有轻微的角度，而非完全居中。皮肤纹理、发丝、睫毛以及连帽衫袖口的粗针织质感等细节清晰可见，背景则柔和地虚化。场景极简，仅展示了一面 {argument name="background" default="纯净的暖灰褐色墙壁"}，没有任何装饰。柔和的室内暖光与微妙的屏幕光从左前方照亮面部，形成柔和的高光和自然的阴影。整体色调低调而温馨，以奶油色、炭黑色、米色和柔和的粉色为主，保留了真实随性自拍的自然感。

descriptions.en: A photorealistic prompt for a close-up selfie-style portrait of a woman in an oversized hoodie with cozy lighting.
descriptions.zh: 一个用于生成温馨灯光下、身穿超大号连帽衫女性特写自拍风格肖像的写实提示词。

A {argument name="subject" default="curious young boy age 10"} in a NASA tshirt gazes up in total wonder beside a giant shiny silver telescope 3x his height pointed toward a breathtaking galaxy view above, "{argument name="brand name" default="STARKIDZ"}" written in glowing whit...

prompts.en: A magical science advertisement poster. A {argument name="subject" default="curious young boy age 10"} in a NASA tshirt gazes up in total wonder beside a giant shiny silver telescope 3x his height pointed toward a breathtaking galaxy view above, "{argument name="brand name" default="STARKIDZ"}" written in glowing white font on the telescope body. Deep dark space background with milky way galaxy colorful nebula clouds and shooting stars. Glowing cosmic typography "{argument name="brand name" default="STARKIDZ"}" in white and blue filling the background. Tagline bottom: "{argument name="tagline" default="Explore the universe."}" Small text top-right corner reads "Designed with GPT Image 2" in grey. Photorealistic, magical kids science product commercial, dramatic deep space galaxy lighting.
prompts.zh: 一张梦幻的科学广告海报。一位 {argument name="subject" default="10 岁的好奇小男孩"} 身穿 NASA T 恤，正满怀惊叹地站在一台比他高 3 倍的巨大闪亮银色望远镜旁，望向头顶壮丽的星系景观，望远镜镜身上用发光的白色字体写着 "{argument name="brand name" default="STARKIDZ"}"。深邃的太空背景中点缀着银河系色彩斑斓的星云和流星。背景中充满发光的宇宙风格字体 "{argument name="brand name" default="STARKIDZ"}"（白色与蓝色）。底部标语："{argument name="tagline" default="探索宇宙。"}"。右上角小字写着 "Designed with GPT Image 2"（灰色）。照片级真实感，梦幻的儿童科学产品广告，戏剧性的深空星系光影。

cases.promptPreview: Create a premium mixed-media advertising poster in vertical format using the uploaded product image as the reference. BRAND INFORMATION Brand Name: {argument name="brand name" default="[BRAND_NAME]"} Hero Product: {argument name="product" default="[HERO_PRODUCT]"} IMPORTANT PRODUCT PRESERVATION Preserve the uploaded p...

prompts.en:
Create a premium mixed-media advertising poster in vertical format using the uploaded product image as the reference.

BRAND INFORMATION
Brand Name: {argument name="brand name" default="[BRAND_NAME]"}
Hero Product: {argument name="product" default="[HERO_PRODUCT]"}

IMPORTANT PRODUCT PRESERVATION
Preserve the uploaded product exactly as shown.

STYLE
Premium advertising campaign. Bright off-white studio background. Minimalist composition. Luxury commercial photography combined with playful black-marker doodle illustrations.

MIXED-MEDIA CONCEPT
The real {argument name="product" default="[HERO_PRODUCT]"} becomes the centerpiece of the scene. Hand-drawn doodle characters interact with the product in a playful and imaginative way.

SCENE
Transform the product into: {argument name="theme" default="[GIANT_OBJECT_OR_THEME]"}

Tiny doodle characters are climbing, exploring, or celebrating.

HEADLINE
Large handwritten marker typography at the top.
"[MAIN_HEADLINE]"

PROMO STICKER
Create a large colorful promotional badge.
Badge Text: "[PROMO_TEXT]"
prompts.zh:
使用上传的产品图片作为参考，创作一张垂直格式的高级混合媒体广告海报。

品牌信息
品牌名称：{argument name="brand name" default="[BRAND_NAME]"}
核心产品：{argument name="product" default="[HERO_PRODUCT]"}

重要产品保留说明
请完整保留上传产品的原始外观。

风格

Convert the person into a {argument name="character type" default="chibi-style character"} with a lar...

prompts.en:
Transform the uploaded selfie into a cute monochrome {argument name="style" default="kawaii doodle illustration"} while preserving the exact pose, facial expression, glasses, hijab, clothing details, and camera angle. Convert the person into a {argument name="character type" default="chibi-style character"} with a large expressive head, tiny body, rounded facial features, soft blush cheeks, oversized sparkling eyes behind glasses, and adorable puckered lips. Clean black ink sketch lines on a {argument name="background color" default="soft pastel pink background"}, minimal color palette, hand-drawn manga doodle aesthetic, playful hearts, sparkles, stars, and tiny decorative elements floating around the character. Simple line-art shading, cozy and charming atmosphere, social-media sticker style, notebook sketchbook illustration, cute anime-inspired proportions, whimsical and trendy Pinterest aesthetic. Preserve accessories such as smartwatch, striped shirt, and hijab folds with simplified cartoon details. High-detail linework, smooth outlines, adorable expression, modern kawaii portrait illustration, minimalistic background, clean composition, cute doodle character design.

Style keywords:
kawaii doodle art, monochrome sketch illustration, chibi portrait, manga line art, cute pastel pink background, hand-drawn ink drawing, Pinterest aesthetic, adorable sticker art, whimsical cartoon style, anime-inspired doodle, minimal color palette, soft blush details.
prompts.zh:
将上传的自拍转换为可爱的单色 {argument name="style" default="可爱涂鸦插画"}，同时精准保留姿势、面部表情、眼镜、头巾、服装细节及拍摄角度。将人物转换为 {argument name="character type" default="Q 版角色"}，拥有大而生动的头部、娇小的身体、圆润的五官、柔和的腮红、眼镜后闪烁的大眼睛以及可爱的嘟嘟唇。在 {argument name="background color" default="柔和淡粉色背景"} 上使用干净的黑色墨水线条勾勒，采用极简配色方案，呈现手绘漫画涂鸦美学，角色周围环绕着俏皮的心形、闪光、星星及微小的装饰元素。简洁的线条阴影，营造舒适迷人的氛围，呈现社交媒体贴纸风格、笔记本素描插画感，具备可爱的动漫比例，充满奇思妙想且符合 Pinterest 流行审美。保留智能手表、条纹衬衫及头巾褶皱等配饰，并进行简化卡通处理。高细节线条、流畅轮廓、可爱的表情、现代可爱肖像插画、极简背景、构图简洁，打造可爱的涂鸦角色设计。

风格关键词：
可爱涂鸦艺术，单色素描插画，Q 版肖像，漫画线条艺术，可爱淡粉色背景，手绘墨水画，Pinterest 审美，可爱贴纸艺术，奇幻卡通风格，动漫风格涂鸦，极简配色，柔和腮红细节。

cases.promptPreview: A warm {argument name="product" default="Italian tomato sauce"} advertisement poster. A cheerful Italian grandmother in a classic red apron proudly holds a wooden spoon dripping with rich tomato sauce beside a giant premium tomato sauce jar 3x her height, featuring vintage Italian countryside illustrations, ripe sun-k...

prompts.en:
A warm {argument name="product" default="Italian tomato sauce"} advertisement poster. A cheerful Italian grandmother in a classic red apron proudly holds a wooden spoon dripping with rich tomato sauce beside a giant premium tomato sauce jar 3x her height, featuring vintage Italian countryside illustrations, ripe sun-kissed tomatoes, olive branches, and rolling Tuscan hills on the label. "{argument name="brand name" default="BELLA SALSA"}" written in elegant red and gold italic font across the jar.

Warm rustic Italian kitchen background with hanging garlic braids, dried herbs, copper pots, fresh tomatoes in wicker baskets, wooden shelves, and textured brick walls. Rich Mediterranean atmosphere with golden afternoon sunlight streaming through a farmhouse window.

Large classic warm serif typography "{argument name="brand name" default="BELLA SALSA"}" in red and gold fills the background, blending seamlessly into the rustic setting. Deep red tomato tones, warm earthy colors, and premium artisanal food branding throughout the composition.

Tagline at the bottom: "Made with amore."

Small text in the top-right corner reads: "Designed with GPT Image 2" in subtle grey.

Photorealistic, authentic Italian food lifestyle editorial, premium gourmet advertising campaign, warm rustic kitchen lighting, ultra-detailed food photography, cinematic composition, luxury packaging design, magazine-quality commercial poster, highly realistic textures, inviting and appetizing atmosphere, 8K resolution, professional food branding.
prompts.zh:
一张温暖的 {argument name="product" default="意式番茄酱"} 广告海报。一位面带微笑的意大利老奶奶穿着经典的红色围裙，自豪地拿着一把木勺，勺上滴落着浓郁的番茄酱；她身旁立着一个比她高出 3 倍的高端番茄酱大罐，罐身印有复古的意大利乡村插画、成熟的阳光番茄、橄榄枝以及托斯卡纳连绵起伏的丘陵。罐身上用优雅的红金双色斜体字写着 "{argument name="brand name" default="BELLA SALSA"}"。

背景为温暖的意式乡村厨房，挂着大蒜辫、干草药，摆放着铜锅、柳条篮里的新鲜番茄、木质搁板和纹理感十足的砖墙。浓郁的地中海风情，金色的午后阳光透过农舍窗户洒入室内。

背景中填充着巨大的经典暖色衬线字体 "{argument name="brand name" default="BELLA SALSA"}"（红金配色），与质朴的环境融为一体。深红色的番茄色调、温暖的泥土色系，以及贯穿整个构图的高端手工食品品牌质感。

底部标语："Made with amore."

右上角的小字写着："Designed with GPT Image 2"，呈低调的灰色。

照片级真实感，地道的意大利美食生活方式社论，高端美食广告活动，温暖的乡村厨房灯光，超精细食品摄影，电影级构图，奢华包装设计，杂志级商业海报，高度逼真的纹理，诱人且开胃的氛围，8K 分辨率，专业食品品牌推广。

prompts.en: Transform the uploaded photo into a stylish {argument name="style" default="aesthetic travel scrapbook collage"}. Keep the face unchanged with 100% facial similarity and natural skin texture. Create a multi-photo Polaroid layout using 4–5 different poses from the original scene, featuring a fashionable woman in a {argument name="outfit" default="pink plaid blazer and skirt"}, white crop top, sunglasses, gold accessories, and a bouquet of pink and white baby’s breath flowers. Add torn paper textures, vintage tape pieces, handwritten notes, doodle hearts, dried flowers, postage stamp elements, film frame borders, and elegant journal-style typography. Use a {argument name="color palette" default="warm beige color palette"} with soft natural daylight, cozy Seoul street vibes, high-end lifestyle photography, clean composition, realistic shadows, premium scrapbook aesthetic, travel diary design, Instagram-worthy collage, ultra-detailed, magazine-quality, 4K resolution. Include inspirational handwritten quotes and subtle Korean-inspired design elements while maintaining a chic, feminine, and dreamy atmosphere.
prompts.zh: 将上传的照片转换为时尚的 {argument name="style" default="唯美旅行手账拼贴"}。保持面部不变，确保 100% 的面部相似度及自然的皮肤纹理。使用原场景中的 4–5 种不同姿势创建多图拍立得布局，展示一位穿着 {argument name="outfit" default="粉色格纹西装外套和短裙"}、白色短款上衣、太阳镜、金色配饰，并手持一束粉白满天星花束的时尚女性。添加撕纸纹理、复古胶带、手写笔记、涂鸦爱心、干花、邮票元素、胶片边框以及优雅的日记风格排版。使用 {argument name="color palette" default="暖米色调"}，营造柔和的自然日光、舒适的首尔街头氛围、高端生活方式摄影感、简洁的构图、逼真的阴影、高级手账美学、旅行日记设计、Instagram 风格拼贴，呈现超精细、杂志级的 4K 分辨率画质。加入励志的手写引语和微妙的韩式设计元素，同时保持时尚、柔美且梦幻的氛围。

Recreate the subject as detailed retro pixel art, with large visible pixels, defined stair-stepped edges, stron...

prompts.en: Create a square 1:1 profile picture using the {argument name="reference" default="uploaded image"} as the exact reference for the pose, composition, and {argument name="art style" default="pixel art style"}. Recreate the subject as detailed retro pixel art, with large visible pixels, defined stair-stepped edges, strong dark outlines, dramatic pixelated shading, vibrant colors, and a crisp 16-bit/32-bit arcade sprite look. Use only a flat solid {argument name="background" default="Pantone 354C green"} background (#00B140). No gradients, textures, text, logos, extra objects, or photorealism. Keep the raised glove, facial features, framing, and overall style exactly the same as the reference.
prompts.zh: 创建一个 1:1 的正方形头像，使用 {argument name="reference" default="上传的图片"} 作为姿势、构图和 {argument name="art style" default="像素艺术风格"} 的精确参考。将主体重新创作为精致的复古像素艺术，要求具有明显的像素颗粒感、清晰的阶梯状边缘、强烈的深色轮廓、极具张力的像素化阴影、鲜艳的色彩以及清脆的 16 位/32 位街机精灵图外观。仅使用平坦的纯色 {argument name="background" default="Pantone 354C 绿色"} 背景（#00B140）。禁止使用渐变、纹理、文字、Logo、额外物体或照片级写实效果。保持抬起的手套、面部特征、构图和整体风格与参考图完全一致。

descriptions.en: Transforms a reference photo into a high-quality 16-bit or 32-bit retro pixel art sprite with a solid green background.
descriptions.zh: 将参考照片转换为高质量的 16 位或 32 位复古像素艺术精灵图，并配以纯绿色背景。

Reduce all details to cute, childlike shapes while preserving the main subject and composition. Naive sketchbook aesthetic, playful an...

Reduce all details to cute, childlike shapes while preserving the main subject and composition. Naive sketchbook aesthetic, playful and whimsical character design, clean {argument name="background color" default="pink"} background, minimal linework, expressive simplicity, handmade doodle style, black ink drawing, charming imperfections, simple {argument name="style" default="cartoon illustration"}. Format 3:4.

cases.author: Jahan Zaib

cases.title: Social Media Post - Japanese Lifestyle Sketch Illustration

titles.en: Social Media Post - Japanese Lifestyle Sketch Illustration
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 日式生活方式素描插画

cases.promptPreview: Create a delicate contemporary Japanese lifestyle illustration with a cozy slice-of-life atmosphere. ART STYLE Hand-drawn pen-and-ink sketch illustration, thin expressive linework, loose imperfect contours, minimalist editorial artwork, soft watercolor washes, subtle paper texture, elegant negative space, sketchbook a...

prompts.en:
Create a delicate contemporary Japanese lifestyle illustration with a cozy slice-of-life atmosphere.

ART STYLE
Hand-drawn pen-and-ink sketch illustration, thin expressive linework, loose imperfect contours, minimalist editorial artwork, soft watercolor washes, subtle paper texture, elegant negative space, sketchbook aesthetic, modern Japanese indie illustration, light and airy composition, contemporary café-art style, emotionally warm and intimate.

CHARACTERS
Two young adults with soft, simplified facial features and natural expressions. Casual oversized clothing, relaxed body language, authentic interaction, candid everyday moment. Faces are minimally rendered with delicate linework rather than detailed realism.

ENVIRONMENT
A cozy indoor setting such as a café, coffee shop, apartment, studio, bookstore, kitchen corner, or creative workspace. Include wooden furniture, coffee mugs, indoor plants, shelves, books, windows, soft decorative details, and small everyday objects. The environment should feel lived-in yet uncluttered.

COMPOSITION
Full-body or three-quarter-body view. Characters seated naturally and facing one another. Balanced asymmetrical layout. Large areas of clean negative space. Storytelling through posture and atmosphere rather than action. Editorial illustration framing. Eye-level perspective.

COLOR PALETTE
Muted and desaturated colors only:
• Dusty blue
• Warm cream
• Soft beige
• Light gray
• Sage green
• Warm brown
• Off-white

Add only one small {argument name="accent color" default="red"} element such as red socks, red shoes, a red mug, or a small red object.

LIGHTING
Soft natural daylight entering through windows. Gentle ambient illumination. No dramatic shadows. Warm, peaceful, calming mood.

RENDERING
Minimal shading. Sparse details. Watercolor-style color fills inside delicate ink outlines. Slightly unfinished sketch quality. High-quality illustration with visible hand-drawn imperfections. Soft edges and subtle texture.

MOOD
Comfortable, quiet, nostalgic, peaceful, intimate, cozy, everyday happiness, slow living, café culture, thoughtful conversation, gentle human connection.

AVOID
Anime screenshots, manga panels, cel shading, digital painting, hyperrealism, photorealism, 3D rendering, glossy surfaces, vibrant saturated colors, cinematic effects, dramatic lighting, excessive details, sharp outlines, heavy shadows, complex backgrounds.

SCENE:
{argument name="scene" default="[INSERT YOUR SCENE DESCRIPTION HERE]"}

The final image should feel like a premium Japanese lifestyle illustration found in an art book, café magazine, design journal, or independent sketchbook collection.
prompts.zh:
创作一幅精致的当代日式生活方式插画，营造温馨的日常氛围。

艺术风格
手绘钢笔素描插画，线条细腻且富有表现力，轮廓松散自然，极简编辑艺术风格，柔和的水彩渲染，微妙的纸张纹理，优雅的留白，速写本美学，现代日式独立插画，构图轻盈通透，当代咖啡馆艺术风格，情感温暖而亲密。

人物
两位年轻人，面部特征柔和简约，表情自然。穿着休闲宽松的服装，肢体语言放松，互动真实，捕捉日常瞬间。面部采用细腻的线条勾勒，而非写实风格。

环境
温馨的室内场景，如咖啡馆、咖啡店、公寓、工作室、书店、角落或创意工作空间。包含木质家具、咖啡杯、室内绿植、书架、书籍、窗户、柔和的装饰细节及小型日常物品。环境应呈现出生活气息，但不过于杂乱。

构图
全身或四分之三身位。人物自然坐着，面对面交流。平衡的非对称布局。大面积的留白。通过姿态和氛围而非动作来叙事。编辑插画式构图。平视视角。

配色方案
仅使用柔和且低饱和度的色彩：
• 灰蓝色
• 暖奶油色
• 柔米色
• 浅灰色
• 鼠尾草绿
• 暖棕色
• 米白色

仅添加一个小的 {argument name="accent color" default="红色"} 元素，例如红袜子、红鞋、红杯子或一个小红物件。

光影
柔和的自然光从窗户射入。温和的环境照明。无戏剧性阴影。氛围温暖、宁静、治愈。

渲染
极简阴影。细节稀疏。在细腻的墨线内进行水彩风格填色。略带未完成的素描质感。高质量插画，保留可见的手绘瑕疵。边缘柔和，纹理微妙。

氛围
舒适、安静、怀旧、平和、亲密、温馨、日常幸福感、慢生活、咖啡文化、深思熟虑的交谈、温柔的人际连接。

避免
动漫截图、漫画分镜、赛璐珞风格、数字绘画、超写实主义、照片写实主义、3D 渲染、光泽表面、鲜艳饱和的色彩、电影特效、戏剧性光影、过度细节、锐利轮廓、浓重阴影、复杂背景。

场景：
{argument name="scene" default="[在此处插入你的场景描述]"}

最终图像应呈现出艺术画册、咖啡馆杂志、设计期刊或独立速写本系列中常见的优质日式生活方式插画质感。

A glowing, warm {argument name="moon phase" default="full moon"} hangs in a dark night sky, partially obscured by the dark silhouette of detailed bamboo or pine branches. Below, a young man with dark, curly hair wears an {argument name="clothing item" default="oversized off-white knit sweater"}. He is captured in candid poses-looking away and then looking up with closed eyes- under {argument name="lighting" default="soft, warm streetlights"} near a quiet body of water. The overall tone is moody, nostalgic, and lo-fi with a slight grainy texture and muted earth tones.
prompts.zh: 一种电影剧照风格的拼贴画。一轮明亮温暖的 {argument name="moon phase" default="满月"} 悬挂在深邃的夜空中，被细节丰富的竹子或松枝剪影部分遮挡。下方，一名留着深色卷发的年轻男子穿着一件 {argument name="clothing item" default="米白色廓形针织毛衣"}。画面捕捉了他不经意间的姿态——看向别处，随后闭眼仰望——背景是宁静水域旁的 {argument name="lighting" default="柔和温暖的街灯"}。整体色调忧郁、怀旧且具有低保真（lo-fi）质感，带有轻微的颗粒感和柔和的大地色调。

prompts.en: Ultra-realistic iPhone photograph taken by the {argument name="setting" default="seaside during sunset"}. A {argument name="subject" default="handsome Korean young man"} is sitting naturally on a large coastal rock, captured from slightly to the side in a waist-up composition. His soft dark hair reaches his ears and gently blows in the ocean breeze, with a few strands falling across his face. He has smooth light warm-toned skin, delicate Korean facial features, straight brows, soft lips, and a calm, peaceful expression with a subtle smile. He is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="relaxed white linen button-up shirt"} with a few top buttons undone, loose light gray-blue wide-leg trousers, and gray Nike Dunk sneakers. His physique is lean and athletic with broad shoulders and a slim waist. Around his neck is a delicate silver necklace with the letter "N" surrounded by small diamonds. The background features a calm gray-blue sea and a glowing golden sunset reflecting softly on the water. He is looking slightly toward the camera instead of directly at it, creating a candid atmosphere. His face is perfectly visible and sharply focused. Natural skin texture, realistic details, soft cinematic lighting, gentle wind movement, authentic iPhone photography aesthetic, ultra-photorealistic, high detail, serene mood, shallow depth of field, editorial lifestyle photography.

cases.title: Product Marketing - Summer Rooftop Lemon Soda

titles.en: Product Marketing - Summer Rooftop Lemon Soda
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 夏日天台柠檬苏打

cases.promptPreview: Subject: {argument name="subject" default="Rooftop lemon soda"} People & Expressions: Three clearly adult {argument name="age group" default="women in their 20s"}. All have natural skin textures, clear Japanese-style natural makeup, and brown to black hair. The woman in the bottom left has a high ponytail and laughs b...

prompts.en:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="Rooftop lemon soda"}

People & Expressions:
Three clearly adult {argument name="age group" default="women in their 20s"}. All have natural skin textures, clear Japanese-style natural makeup, and brown to black hair. The woman in the bottom left has a high ponytail and laughs brightly while looking up at a giant glass. The woman in the top right has a short bob and sits on the rim of the glass with a gentle smile. The woman in the bottom right has shoulder-length black hair and sits on a cloth, looking up happily.

Clothing & Poses:
The bottom-left woman wears a white sleeveless top, coral red shorts, and is barefoot. She rests one foot on a transparent ice block and reaches her right hand toward the giant glass. The top-right woman wears a yellow open-knit sleeveless top, light blue denim shorts, and white strap sandals. She sits naturally on the top-right rim of the giant glass, her seat and thighs firmly in contact with the edge. She lightly holds a thick red and white striped straw with one hand and rests the other hand on the rim. Her legs hang naturally outward, one slightly forward and one back for stability. The bottom-right woman wears a white sheer shirt, pale orange inner layer, and pale yellow shorts, sitting relaxed with one hand behind her.

Background & Lighting:
A Japanese rooftop terrace. White railings, blurred city buildings in the distance, potted plants, a small white table, and drink accessories. A giant transparent glass of lemon soda sits in the center. Golden carbonated liquid, plenty of bubbles, large ice cubes, sliced lemons, topped with vanilla ice cream and a red cherry. Strong summer sunlight from the top right creates warm highlights on cheeks, hair, shoulders, glass rim, water drops, ice, lemons, and the wet floor. Thin puddles on the floor reflect the sparkling light.

Composition & Camera:
9:16 vertical aspect ratio. The giant lemon soda glass is centered, occupying about 65-70% of the frame. The three women are arranged in a triangle. Camera is at a slightly low, eye-level angle. Natural compression of approximately 50mm. Subjects and glass are sharp, background is softly blurred with shallow depth of field.

Texture & Style:
Bright, warm Japanese-style realistic photography. Refreshing and open, like a summer advertisement. High-definition depiction of glass thickness, transparency, refraction, condensation, bubbles, ice edges, lemon pulp, and floor reflections. Overlayed with colorful hand-drawn doodles and Japanese notes. Yellow cloud bubble: 'Happiness lemon soda found on the rooftop ♡', pink: 'Best~!!', purple: 'Fizzy fizzy~', light blue: 'So cold!', yellow: 'Big summer memories ♡', bottom blue: 'Splashing sparkling~!!'. Light and fun summer album style.
prompts.zh:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="天台柠檬苏打"}

人物与表情：
三位明显的成年 {argument name="age group" default="20 多岁的女性"}。她们都拥有自然的皮肤纹理、清透的日系自然妆容，发色从棕色到黑色不等。左下角的女性扎着高马尾，抬头看向巨大的玻璃杯，笑得十分灿烂。右上角的女性留着短波波头，坐在杯沿上，带着温柔的微笑。右下角的女性留着齐肩黑发，坐在布上，开心地抬头仰望。

服装与姿势：
左下角的女性身穿白色无袖上衣和珊瑚红短裤，赤着双脚。她一只脚踩在透明冰块上，右手伸向巨大的玻璃杯。右上角的女性身穿黄色镂空无袖上衣、浅蓝色牛仔短裤，脚蹬白色绑带凉鞋。她自然地坐在巨大玻璃杯的右上沿，臀部和大腿与杯沿紧密贴合。她一只手轻轻握住红白相间的粗吸管，另一只手搭在杯沿上。双腿自然下垂，一前一后以保持平衡。右下角的女性身穿白色透视衬衫，内搭浅橙色上衣和淡黄色短裤，姿态放松，一只手撑在身后。

背景与光影：
日式天台露台。白色栏杆、远处模糊的城市建筑、盆栽、一张白色小桌和饮品配件。中心摆放着一杯巨大的透明柠檬苏打。金色的碳酸液体、丰富的气泡、大块冰块、柠檬切片，顶部配有香草冰淇淋和一颗红樱桃。来自右上方的强烈夏日阳光在脸颊、头发、肩膀、杯沿、水珠、冰块、柠檬和湿润的地面上投下温暖的高光。地面上的浅水洼反射着粼粼波光。

构图与摄影：
9:16 竖屏比例。巨大的柠檬苏打杯位于画面中心，占据约 65-70% 的空间。三位女性呈三角形排列。相机处于略低的平视角度。约 50mm 的自然压缩感。主体和玻璃杯清晰锐利，背景采用浅景深虚化处理。

质感与风格：
明亮、温暖的日系写实摄影。清新开阔，宛如夏季广告大片。高清呈现玻璃的厚度、透明度、折射效果、冷凝水珠、气泡、冰块边缘、柠檬果肉以及地面的倒影。画面叠加了色彩缤纷的手绘涂鸦和日文笔记。黄色云朵气泡写着：“在天台发现幸福柠檬苏打 ♡”，粉色写着：“最棒了~!!”，紫色写着：“嘶嘶冒泡~”，浅蓝色写着：“好冰！”，黄色写着：“盛夏的美好回忆 ♡”，底部蓝色写着：“清凉气泡溅起~!!”。轻快有趣的夏日相册风格。

descriptions.en: A detailed cinematic shot of three women enjoying lemon soda on a Japanese rooftop with handwritten notes.
descriptions.zh: 一张极具电影感的细节特写，三位女性在日式天台上享用柠檬苏打，画面配有手写笔记。

prompts.en: A cute anime-inspired young woman with {argument name="hair style" default="shoulder-length blonde hair"}, soft side-swept bangs, round eyeglasses, and a {argument name="expression" default="gentle smile"}. She is posing thoughtfully with one finger resting on her chin, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="light blue oversized shirt over a white top and a white pleated skirt"}. The character stands in the center as the main focus. Behind her is a creative black-and-white doodle collage featuring multiple sketch-style portraits of herself in different frames and poses. Hand-drawn hearts, stars, arrows, sparkles, swirls, and cute comic elements surround the sketches. Playful handwritten words like "WOW!", "LOVE IT!", "SO CUTE!", and "OMG!" appear throughout the background. She wears a {argument name="headwear" default="distressed denim cap"}, long wavy ash-brown hair cascading over a slightly oversized {argument name="jacket style" default="denim jacket"} layered over a black cropped tee, high-waisted {argument name="pants style" default="faded jeans"} with a large ripped knee, and classic black sneakers with white stripes. Accessories: delicate gold clover pendant, small hoop earrings, thin bracelet, a smartwatch, and a few rings. Relaxed pose with one leg propped, elbow resting on knee, hand tipping the cap, direct engaging gaze, slightly parted lips. Soft, even studio lighting with gentle shadows for dimensionality, shallow depth of field to keep her face and outfit razor-sharp while subtly blurring the background, natural skin tones, high-resolution crisp detail, moody yet approachable color grading, photorealistic, editorial fashion photography aesthetic.
prompts.zh: 一张全身竖构图的时尚人像，一位自信的年轻女性坐在简单的凳子上，背景为深蓝色摄影棚背景，呈现出随性的都市杂志风格。她佩戴着 {argument name="headwear" default="做旧丹宁鸭舌帽"}，灰棕色的长波浪卷发垂落在略显宽松的 {argument name="jacket style" default="丹宁夹克"} 上，内搭黑色短款 T 恤，穿着高腰 {argument name="pants style" default="水洗牛仔裤"}，膝盖处有大面积破洞，脚踩经典的黑白条纹运动鞋。配饰：精致的金色四叶草吊坠、小巧的圆环耳环、细手链、智能手表和几枚戒指。姿态放松，单腿支起，手肘靠在膝盖上，手扶帽檐，目光直视镜头，双唇微张。柔和均匀的摄影棚灯光营造出富有层次感的阴影，浅景深效果使面部和服装细节极其锐利，同时背景呈现微妙的虚化，肤色自然，高分辨率细节清晰，色调情绪化且易于亲近，具有照片级逼真的杂志时尚摄影美感。
